ExecuteLua.code: pcall(function() entity.soul:SetTarget(nil) end); pcall(function() entity.human:DrawWeapon(false) end)
pcall(function() if entity.human:IsWeaponDrawn() then entity.human:DrawWeapon(false) end end)

local vel = entity:GetVelocity() data.currentSpeed = vel and math.sqrt(vel.x^2 + vel.y^2) or 0
local pVel = player:GetVelocity() data.playerSpeed = pVel and math.sqrt(pVel.x^2 + pVel.y^2) or 0

local vel = entity:GetVelocity() data.currentSpeed = vel and math.sqrt(vel.x^2 + vel.y^2) or 0
local pVel = player:GetVelocity() data.playerSpeed = pVel and math.sqrt(pVel.x^2 + pVel.y^2) or 0

local ok = pcall(function() local isDead = false if not entity.actor then isDead = true end if entity.actor and entity.actor.IsDead and entity.actor:IsDead() then isDead = true end local ok2, health = pcall(function() return entity.soul:GetState('health') end) if not ok2 or health == nil or health <= 0 or entity.actor:IsUnconscious() then isDead = true end
if isDead then data.distanceToPlayer = 0.0 return end
local pe = XGenAIModule.GetEntityByWUID(data.playerWUID) if not pe then return end local pp = pe:GetPos() local mp = entity:GetPos() if pp and mp then local dx,dy,dz = pp.x-mp.x, pp.y-mp.y, pp.z-mp.z data.distanceToPlayer = math.sqrt(dx*dx+dy*dy+dz*dz) end end)

local ok, err = pcall(function() if _G.MercIdle then return end
local isDead = false if not entity.actor then isDead = true end if entity.actor and entity.actor.IsDead and entity.actor:IsDead() then isDead = true end if entity.actor:IsUnconscious() then isDead = true end local ok2, health = pcall(function() return entity.soul:GetState('health') end)
if not ok2 or health == nil or health <= 0 then isDead = true end
if isDead then return end
if data.goFlee then return end
local pe = XGenAIModule.GetEntityByWUID(data.playerWUID) if not pe then return end
local distance = 10 local playerPos = pe:GetWorldPos() local playerDir = pe:GetDirectionVector() local eyePos = {x=playerPos.x, y=playerPos.y, z=playerPos.z + 1.6} local rayDistance = distance + 2 local hitTable = {} local numRays = 10 local arcAngle = 100 local startAngle = -arcAngle / 2 local angleStep = arcAngle / (numRays - 1) local bestDir = nil local bestDist = -1 local backDir = {x = -playerDir.x, y = -playerDir.y, z = -playerDir.z}
for i = 0, numRays - 1 do local angleOffset = startAngle + (i * angleStep) local rotatedDir = VectorUtils.Rotate2D(backDir, angleOffset) local checkVec = VectorUtils.Scale(rotatedDir, rayDistance) local hits = Physics.RayWorldIntersection(eyePos, checkVec, 2, ent_all, pe.id, nil, hitTable) local clearDist = rayDistance if hits > 0 and hitTable[1] then clearDist = hitTable[1].dist end clearDist = clearDist - (math.abs(angleOffset)/180) if clearDist > bestDist then bestDist = clearDist bestDir = rotatedDir end end
local spawnPos = {} if bestDist < rayDistance then local safeDistance = math.max(bestDist - 2.0, 3.0) spawnPos.x = playerPos.x + bestDir.x * safeDistance spawnPos.y = playerPos.y + bestDir.y * safeDistance spawnPos.z = playerPos.z else spawnPos.x = playerPos.x + bestDir.x * distance spawnPos.y = playerPos.y + bestDir.y * distance spawnPos.z = playerPos.z end
local groundCheckStart = {x=spawnPos.x, y=spawnPos.y, z=spawnPos.z + 2.0} local groundCheckDir = {x=0, y=0, z=-100} local groundHits = Physics.RayWorldIntersection(groundCheckStart, groundCheckDir, 2, ent_terrain + ent_static, 0, nil, hitTable) if groundHits > 0 and hitTable[1] then spawnPos.z = hitTable[1].pos.z else spawnPos.z = playerPos.z end
entity:SetPos({x = spawnPos.x, y = spawnPos.y, z = spawnPos.z}) end) if not ok then System.LogAlways('[Mercenary] Teleport Error: ' .. tostring(err)) end

local isDead = false if not entity.actor then isDead = true end if entity.actor and entity.actor:IsUnconscious() then isDead = true end local ok, health = pcall(function() return entity.soul:GetState('health') end) if not ok or health == nil or health <= 0 then isDead = true end if isDead and _G.MercSpeakingOwner == tostring(entity.this.id) then _G.MercSpeakingLock = false _G.MercSpeakingOwner = nil System.LogAlways('[Mercenary] Speaking lock force-released: owner died/despawned.') end
local ok, health = pcall(function() return entity.soul:GetState('health') end) if ok and health ~= nil and health < 50 then data.isInjured = true else data.isInjured = false end
if _G.MercSpeakingLock then data.canSpeak = false else data.canSpeak = true _G.MercSpeakingLock = true _G.MercSpeakingOwner = tostring(entity.this.id) end
System.LogAlways('[Mercenary] Going to play random line ' .. tostring(data.barkRandom))
if _G.MercSpeakingLock then data.canSpeak = false else data.canSpeak = true _G.MercSpeakingLock = true _G.MercSpeakingOwner = tostring(entity.this.id) end
